{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Ghostwater project
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Ghostwater project]] is a project that may have succeeded.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
